92c51a53531d.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
92c51a53531d.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
92c51a53531d.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

1c2ac46c8e0a.title: Close the hygiene gap — 3 to 5
1c2ac46c8e0a.description: An FSA rating of 3 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
1c2ac46c8e0a.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

871ee5c54469.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
871ee5c54469.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

e048a6bbade9.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
e048a6bbade9.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
e048a6bbade9.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

5b166d247205.title: Guest experience outpaces formal trust record
5b166d247205.description: Guests enjoy the venue but the compliance record hasn't kept up. One poor inspection would make a private gap public. The fix is proactive compliance work, not more marketing.
5b166d247205.expected_upside: Close the gap before it becomes visible

13470c918ed0.title: Ranked #15 of 18 locally — peers are ahead
13470c918ed0.description: At percentile 17.6, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

f253db0303d8.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
f253db0303d8.description: You trail peers by 1.7 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

5e9dd295a635.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
5e9dd295a635.description: At 132 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
